Slide 1 of 15

Overview

Optimize your workflow with the powerful performance of Lenovo Yoga Slim 7x Copilot+ laptop. It features a Snapdragon X Elite processor that simplifies your multitasking. A 1TB solid state drive ensures blazing-fast data access. Enjoy vivid visuals and intuitive interaction on a 14.5-inch OLED touchscreen. Its Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 5.3, and USB-C ports redefine connectivity.

Lenovo Yoga Slim 7x 14.5" Touchscreen Copilot+ PC Laptop - Cosmic Blue (Snapdragon X Elite/16GB RAM/1TB SSD)

Computer Setup with Data Transfer
A Geek Squad Agent will come to your home or business to assist you in backing up data from your existing device, setup your new computer, make sure your software is up-to-date and ready to use. Please note, this service is not available in remote locations.

Sponsored

What's included:

  • Computer
  • User Guide
  • 65W USB C Charger
  • Snapdragon X Elite (X1E-78-100) processor and 16GB RAM offer impressive multitasking performance for efficiently handling workload
  • Copilot+ PC helps you work smarter and faster
  • 1TB solid state drive enables ultra-fast data access and seamless storage performance
  • 14.5-inch OLED touchscreen with a 2944 x 1840 resolution and 90Hz refresh rate, stuns you with detailed visuals and vibrant colour accuracy
  • Wi-Fi 7 2 x 2 and Bluetooth 5.3 offer ultra-fast wireless connectivity and smooth device pairing
  • Up to 15 hours of battery life, so you can work, stream, and create longer without constantly reaching for a charger
  • Three USB-C 4.0 ports (DP 1.4, PD 3.1) ensure high-speed data transfer, advanced display capabilities, and versatile charging options
  • Glossy display featuring HDR True Black 600 ensures deep, rich blacks and stunning contrasts, for an incredibly immersive visual experience
  • 1080p IR webcam offers high-definition video quality and infrared capabilities for clear visuals, even in low-light situations
  • Preloaded Windows 11 Home operating system packs a modern, user-friendly interface for improving productivity and streamlining daily tasks
Best Buy Showcase

Top 10 laptops for students based on what matters most

Let’s move forward together with Windows 11.

In compliance with Bill 29, Best Buy and third-party sellers on Best Buy Marketplace do not guarantee the availability of replacement parts, repair services, or maintenance information for any products. Coverage provided through any Best Buy Protection programs and applicable manufacturer warranties, if any, remain in place. Information about the manufacturer’s availability guarantee can be found .
